This genus is further classified within the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The family Polypodiaceae is a part of the division Pteridophyta, which contains all ferns. intro: Arthropteris palisotii, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern in the family Cyatheaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its expectorant properties.
